recommendations.title: Blood Diner
recommendations.overview: Two cannibalistic brothers kill various young women to make their flesh part of a new special dish at their rundown restaurant while seeking blood sacrifices to awaken a dormant Egyptian goddess.

recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: A woman prepares for bed, but realizes that something may be lurking in the shadows.

recommendations.title: Ice Cream Man

recommendations.title: Witching & Bitching
recommendations.overview: A gang of gold thieves land in a coven of witches who are preparing for an ancient ritual... and in need of a sacrifice.

recommendations.title: Until Dawn
recommendations.overview: One year after her sister Melanie mysteriously disappeared, Clover and her friends head into the remote valley where she vanished in search of answers. Exploring an abandoned visitor center, they find themselves stalked by a masked killer and horrifi

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Shazam!
recommendations.overview: A boy is given the ability to become an adult superhero in times of need with a single magic word.

recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: Rebecca must unlock the terror behind her little brother's experiences that once tested her sanity, bringing her face to face with a supernatural spirit attached to their mother.

recommendations.title: Guinea Pig Part 2: Flower of Flesh and Blood
recommendations.overview: A woman kidnapped in the dead of night awakens in a grisly dungeon, where her deranged assailant prepares her body for a morbid ritual.

recommendations.title: Piercing
